elements.content: 前端 React 渲染器专注于极致的实时交互体验、实时拖拽和智能排版微调，让用户能直观看到每一个像素的调整效果。
后端 Python 渲染器则专注于生成纯净、无冗余 of native PPTX 文件，支持离线演示和企业级高质量排版定制。

The Anthropic Economic Futures program aims to support research and policy development for addressing the economic impacts of AI. It provides research grants, forums for policy discussion, and evidence on real-world AI use.

Analyzing how
Claude is used
across the economy.

The Anthropic Economic Index reveals the shape of AI adoption across the world. Here, you can explore the data behind our research to understand how people are using Claude across every US state and hundreds of occupations.
Our models are constantly improving on coding, math, and reasoning. Claude can complete complex engineering tasks to solve problems that would typically take a full day of engineering work.
Claude offers superior instruction following, tool selection, error correction, and advanced reasoning for customer-facing agents and complex AI workflows.
Claude can extract relevant information from business emails and documents, categorize and summarize survey responses, and wrangle reams of text with high speed and accuracy.
Claude can handle ticket triage, on-demand complex inquiries using rich context awareness, and multi-step support workflows—all with a casual tone and conversational responses.
AI 驱动的 PPT 生成器
从结构化内容到可编辑演示文稿的生成工作流
React editor · PPTX export · V1 prototype
先确定语义版式，再让主题风格负责视觉呈现。
模型负责选择版式和填充内容，应用负责坐标、渲染、编辑和导出。这样预览与 PPTX 才能保持一致。
V1 只保留会直接影响生成质量的模块，不提前引入复杂协作能力。
从用户输入整理章节与叙事顺序
根据内容形状选择语义版式
只写入模板允许的文字与图片槽
React 预览与 PPTX 共享同一 JSON
从自由生成到受控生成
AI 容易改动坐标、样式和层级，输出难以验证，也难以稳定导出。
模板控制视觉，AI 只决定内容和版式选择，结果更容易校验。
把一次生成拆成可检查的四个阶段，减少后期返工。
用户描述主题、受众与页数
生成章节和每页内容意图
匹配语义模板与内容槽位
账单式 KPI 用来呈现少量关键指标，避免把数据页做成拥挤表格。
所有数字都应来自结构化字段
You can delete this slide when you’re done editing the presentation

Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun and the smallest one in the Solar System—it’s only a bit larger than the Moon. The planet’s name has nothing to do with the liquid metal
Venus has a beautiful name and is the second planet from the Sun. It’s terribly hot—even hotter than Mercury—and its atmosphere is extremely poisonous
Jupiter is a gas giant and the biggest planet in the Solar System. It's the fourth-brightest object in the night sky. It was named after the Roman god of the skies and lightning
“This is a quote. Words full of wisdom that someone important said and can make the reader get inspired.”
Big numbers catch your audience’s attention
The Sun’s mass compared to Earth’s
Distance between Earth and the Moon

A picture always reinforces
the concept
Images reveal large amounts of data, so remember: use an image instead of a long text. Your audience will appreciate it

Despite being red, Mars is actually a cold place. It’s full of iron oxide dust, which gives the planet its reddish cast
